title: Wholesome Greek Banana Saganaki
description: A sweet and salty Greek-inspired dish featuring fried ripe bananas, baked with feta and lemon zest, served on a wooden board.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Slice each banana into 1/4 inch thick rounds and lightly fry them until golden on both sides.
Place fried banana slices onto a wooden board.
Sprinkle crumbled feta, lemon zest, allulose, dill, salt, and pepper over the bananas.
Bake the arrangement in the preheated oven for 10 minutes until the feta melts slightly.
Remove from oven and slice the bananas into halves for serving.
Serve warm directly from the wooden board for an authentic saganaki experience.
